title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Treaty Between Naram-Sin and Elam
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Treaty Between Naram-Sin and Elam.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Treaty Between Naram-Sin and Elam.

translation.text: From 'Treaty Between Naram-Sin and Elam': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
